title: Oberoi Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Oberoi Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Oberoi Realty are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Oberoi Realty:
Oberoi Realty is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Realty!
